final_prompt.prompt:
Create a domestic China fundraising roadshow PPT cover for GPT-5.5 launch, speaker Sam Altman, tailored for Chinese GP audience.

Style/medium: clean institutional pitch deck aesthetic with the understated authority of Linear's product design, designed for Chinese venture capital sensibility
Composition: centered title hierarchy with generous negative space, speaker name anchored at bottom third, subtle geometric accent element
Subject: GPT-5.5 launch announcement as the primary headline, Sam Altman as keynote speaker, supporting tagline about next-generation AI capabilities
Scene/backdrop: minimal gradient or solid neutral background with subtle tech-forward texture, no literal imagery
Lighting/mood: the calm confidence of a well-rehearsed pitch, professional and trustworthy
Color palette: institutional navy and slate with one accent of muted gold or teal, the chromatic language of serious capital
Materials/textures: matte surface quality suggesting premium paper stock, subtle grain for depth without distraction
Text (verbatim): GPT-5.5 发布, 演讲人：Sam Altman (奥特曼)
Constraints: must read as credible to Chinese GP investors, balance Silicon Valley credibility with domestic roadshow conventions, clear typographic hierarchy for projection
Avoid: flashy gradients, startup-style neon colors, cluttered hero imagery, Western-centric visual clichés, excessive decoration that undermines institutional trust
